Off Calendar Jan-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRIAN MCGURK OF MICHAEL & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (805) 379-8505 EXT. 1154 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. PHIL FOSTER OF THE TOUR-SARKISSIAN LAW OFFICES, TEL. NO. 626-7744 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT LEONID ZINCHIK'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Overruled with ten days to answer. Plaintiff's claims are adequately alleged and not uncertain. Defendant's reliance on extrinsic evidence is improper. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR # 11918 =(302/HEK)

Off Calendar Jan-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

ATTY. PHIL FOSTER OF THE TOUR-SARKISSIAN LAW OFFICES, TEL. NO. 626-7744 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.
